description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is launching the app for the first time
AND the user is on the Getting Started page
AND focus is not on the "Getting Started" button

NOTE: To simulate launching the app for the first time, the tester needs to select the "Clear Browser Storage" button in Dev Settings on the Settings page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to the "Getting Started" button
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Getting Started, press select to create a new MLB.TV account, Press or scroll down if you already have an MLB.TV account."
